messages.subject: Meridian SOW review — let's find a time
messages.body_text:
Dr. Fong,

Our counsel (Orion Legal) has reviewed the SOW draft and we have two redline items to discuss — nothing blocking, but we want to align before execution.

Would February 18 at 2pm PT work for a 45-minute call? Priya will join from our side.

— Tessa Moreno
Head of Sales, Vectrix Labs
tessa@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Meridian SOW review — let's find a time
messages.body_text:
Hi Tessa,

Feb 18 at 2pm PT doesn't work — I have a standing board prep that runs until 3pm.

Can we do Feb 19 at 11am PT, or Feb 20 at 10am PT?

— Dr. Alan Fong
VP Engineering, Meridian Health Systems
alan.fong@meridianhealth.com

messages.subject: Calendar invite: Meridian SOW Review — Feb 19, 11am PT
messages.body_text:
Sending the calendar invite now. Details:

Title: Meridian Health Systems / Vectrix Labs — SOW Review
Date: Wednesday, February 19, 2026
Time: 11:00am – 11:45am PT
Zoom: https://vectrix.zoom.us/j/84726193048

Agenda:
1. Two redline items from Orion Legal (SLA credits §5.1, termination clause §6.1)
2. Per-org retention config timeline (VEC-47)
3. SAML SSO activation timeline
4. Next steps to contract execution

— Nina Kowalski
Ops & People, Vectrix Labs
nina@vectrix.io
